name: checkname
description: Check domain and social handle availability across common platforms for brand and product naming work.

interface.shortDescription: Check domain and social namespace availability
interface.longDescription: Probe domain candidates via RDAP and social handles via public profile URLs, then compare candidate variants conservatively across platforms.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this product name is available on .com and GitHub.
Compare three brand variants across domains and major social platforms.
Give me the cleanest namespace option for this launch.
